sections.title: Talking with a full grape barrel in your inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: One barrel o' grapes here for you, boss!

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: Great work! Here, keep some grapes as payment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have some gold instead?

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh...

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: Now, if you're up for it, I wouldn't say no to you filling the barrel up again.

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: Nilsal, friend. How goes it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you need any help in the vineyards?

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: Well we could always use a spare pair of hands!

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: Here, fill this barrel with four sets of ripe grapes and bring it back to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got it! One barrel full of grapes coming right up.

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: Just remember, I need them to be ripe. Generally, perfectly ripe grapes are full and vibrant. They'll shine in the sunlight more than others.

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: Hopefully you know what you’re doing now. Just fill this barrel with four sets of ripe grapes and bring it back to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got it! One barrel full of grapes coming right up.

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: Just remember, I need them to be ripe. Generally, perfectly ripe grapes are full and vibrant. They'll shine in the sunlight more than others.

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: We could always use a spare pair of hands! I have a grape barrel here for you, but you don't have enough room for it at the moment. Come back once you can carry it.

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: You've already got that grape barrel I gave you. Fill it with four sets of ripe grapes and bring it back to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got it! One barrel full of grapes coming right up.

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: Just remember, I need them to be ripe. Generally, perfectly ripe grapes are full and vibrant. They'll shine in the sunlight more than others.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Doesn't it get hot standing out here all day?

lines.speaker: Vineyard foreman
lines.text: Ah, you get used to it. Besides, I have a near-infinite supply of lukewarm grape juice to keep me hydrated!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good. I'll be going now.
